flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Transylvania University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (70.1% → 55.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Transylvania University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.5k → $46.9k).
